segments.text: Prophesy unto the mountains of Israel, and say, Ye mountains of Israel, hear the word of the LORD:
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: Because the enemy hath said against you, Aha, even the ancient high places are ours in possession:
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Because they have made you desolate, and swallowed you up on every side, that ye might be a possession unto the residue of the heathen, and ye are taken up in the lips of talkers, and are an infamy of the people:
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

footnotes: are taken up in the lips of the tongue: or, ye are made to come up on the lip of the tongue

segments.text: But ye, O mountains of Israel, ye shall shoot forth your branches, and yield your fruit to my people of Israel; for they are at hand to come.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Moreover the word of the LORD came unto me, saying,
But I had pity for mine holy name, which the house of Israel had profaned among the heathen, whither they went.
Then will I sprinkle clean water upon you, and ye shall be clean: from all your filthiness, and from all your idols, will I cleanse you.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: As the holy flock, as the flock of Jerusalem in her solemn feasts; so shall the waste cities be filled with flocks of men: and they shall know that I am the LORD.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

footnotes: holy flock: Heb. flock of holy things
